TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Your Telegram Bot Token from @BotFather. Required to run the bot.

MONGODB_URI.description: Your MongoDB connection string (e.g., mongodb+srv://...). Required for database storage.

ADMIN_TELEGRAM_ID.description: Optional: Your Telegram User ID. If set, unlocks admin commands like /stats.

REDIS_URL.description: Optional: Redis connection string (e.g., redis://...) for rate limiting and fast caching.

PUBLIC_URL.description: Optional: The public URL of the deployed web application (e.g., https://my-app.up.railway.app). Used for login magic links.
